title: Bhooloham
desc: Boologam and Arumugam are two famous boxers whose families are arch-rivals. Taking this into consideration, Deepak, a businessman, hatches a plan to use their rivalry to his advantage.

title: Karuthamma
desc: A woman, who lives in a village where female infanticide is a common practice, goes to great lengths to get justice when her sister and her newborn child are murdered in cold blood.

title: Kodi Parakuthu
desc: A mafia leader tries to kill policeman Sivagiri, who took down his illegal businesses, with the help of a lookalike. Later, Sivagiri discovers that the leader is responsible for his father's death.

title: Aal
desc: Amir, a college professor, moves to the city, full of big dreams and aspirations. However, these quickly transform into a nightmare when he is blackmailed by a mysterious man into doing his bidding.

title: Karuppu Nila
desc: After his father is falsely accused of aiding terrorists, Shanmuga Pandian's girlfriend leaves him. However, he joins forces with Nandhini and battles against all odds to clear his father's name.
